/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/EngineCore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/renderable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/movable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/controllable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/materialMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/rotatedCube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/texturedCube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/src/model.cpp.o -o RacingGame   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/assimp/6.0.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/assimp/6.0.2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -lassimp
